creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 207133
phpldapadmin extra patch for php73

Hi,

I've found that PLA is not working correctly with php73 - sarch button.

I've made an extra patch (only applied for php73 support), so attached patch is correcting this issue.

I've tested this patch with portlint and poudrieere. There is no errors.
